descricao_pt: Uma pessoa moderna segurando um celular sem sinal no meio do deserto, com Moisés e o povo de Israel ao fundo, mostrando o contraste entre épocas
prompt_en: Whiteboard drawing illustration style. Clean solid black outlines, hand-drawn appearance. Flat soft colors inside the outlines (beige, warm yellow, light blue, sand tones). Simple white/cream background. Educational animated video style, biblical content. Minimalist and friendly style. No gradients, no shadows, no photorealism. A modern person in casual clothes holding a smartphone with no signal bars, standing in a desert landscape, looking confused. In the background, Moses in biblical robes holding a staff with a group of Israelites in traditional Middle Eastern clothing. Characters have expressive eyes with visible iris, pupils and eyebrows. Sand dunes and simple desert elements.

prompt_en: Whiteboard drawing illustration style. Clean solid black outlines, hand-drawn appearance. Flat soft colors inside the outlines (beige, warm yellow, light blue, sand tones). Simple white/cream background. Educational animated video style, biblical content. Minimalist and friendly style. No gradients, no shadows, no photorealism. A horizontal timeline with six simple icons connected by arrows: a tree representing Creation, a broken heart for the Fall, a Star of David for Israel, a cross for Jesus, a simple church building for the Church, and a crown for God's Kingdom. Each icon in soft flat colors. Clean educational diagram layout.
